channel.title: League of Legends Dev News
channel.description: Latest developer updates and diaries from the League of Legends team.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T18:00:00.000Z/dev: WASD’s Ranked ReleaseAfter months of testing and feedback, WASD is finally ready for primetime.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T18:00:00.000Z/dev: WASD’s Ranked ReleaseAfter months of testing and feedback, WASD is finally ready for primetime.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000Z/dev: Leveling Up ArenaA rundown of all the changes coming to Arena in Season 2.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000Z/dev: Leveling Up ArenaA rundown of all the changes coming to Arena in Season 2.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Pandemonium, Arena & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Pandemonium, Arena & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZDev Update: Arena Updates & MorePabro and Meddler talk about Season Two Pandemonium, gameplay changes, Arena updates, and more.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZDev Update: Arena Updates & MorePabro and Meddler talk about Season Two Pandemonium, gameplay changes, Arena updates, and more.

item.title: Dev2026-03-28T17:00:00.000ZTFT Dev Drop: SPACE GODSThe Space Gods have arrived! Earn their boon and take to the stars with their godly power.
item.description: Dev2026-03-28T17:00:00.000ZTFT Dev Drop: SPACE GODSThe Space Gods have arrived! Earn their boon and take to the stars with their godly power.

item.title: Dev2026-03-26T16:00:00.000ZTFT Dev Drop TeaserWho needs a Carousel when you can beseech the stars?
item.description: Dev2026-03-26T16:00:00.000ZTFT Dev Drop TeaserWho needs a Carousel when you can beseech the stars?

item.title: Dev2026-03-13T18:00:00.000Z/dev: Team Voice in LeagueOur plans for team-based voice communications in League.
item.description: Dev2026-03-13T18:00:00.000Z/dev: Team Voice in LeagueOur plans for team-based voice communications in League.

item.title: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Ranked, Shyvana & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.
item.description: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Ranked, Shyvana & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.

item.title: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000Z/dev: MMR-to-Rank DistributionOur goals for Ranked and some changes to keep your climbs fair and competitive.
item.description: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000Z/dev: MMR-to-Rank DistributionOur goals for Ranked and some changes to keep your climbs fair and competitive.

item.title: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000Z/dev: Bans for Severely Abusive ChatWe’re taking action against severely abusive chat starting in 26.5.
item.description: Dev2026-03-02T16:00:00.000Z/dev: Bans for Severely Abusive ChatWe’re taking action against severely abusive chat starting in 26.5.
